title: CASE OF EDIZIONI DEL ROMA SOCIETA COOPERATIVA A.R.L. AND EDIZIONI DEL ROMA S.R.L. v. ITALY
conclusion: No violation of Article 6 - Right to a fair trial (Article 6 - Criminal proceedings;Article 6-1 - Access to court;Fair hearing;Equality of arms;Impartial tribunal;Independent tribunal;Public hearing)
